examples.title: Basic connection indicator
examples.description: A live connection pill with its default icon and label.

examples.title: Polling vs live
examples.description: Polling reads quieter and different from live through icon, motion, and font-weight — not color alone.

examples.title: Reconnecting with attempt count
examples.description: The reconnecting state showing a retry attempt via the attempt snippet.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { ConnectionIndicator } from '@lostgradient/cinder/connection-indicator';
</script>

<ConnectionIndicator status="reconnecting">
  {#snippet attempt()}
    attempt 3 of 5
  {/snippet}
</ConnectionIndicator>

examples.title: All connection states
examples.description: Each of the six states with its own icon and text label. Colors come from shared semantic tokens, so some states intentionally share a tone (e.g. connecting/reconnecting) — the icon and text carry the distinction, never color alone.
